sentences.english: My neighborhood is so noisy at night.
Cars honking, people shouting — it never stops.
sentences.korean: 경적 소리 소리 지르는 사람들 — 멈추지 않아요.

sentences.english: I sleep with earplugs because my neighbor's dog barks all night.
sentences.korean: 이웃 개가 밤새 짖어서 귀마개를 끼고 자요.

sentences.english: It's the only way I can get any sleep.
I moved to the countryside specifically for the quiet, and it was the best decision ever.
sentences.korean: 조용함을 위해 특별히 시골로 이사했고 최고의 결정이었어요.

quiz.question: What does '경적 울리기' mean in English?
